# HomeStyle Furniture Co., Ltd. — B2B Home Furniture Manufacturer

## About
HomeStyle Furniture Co., Ltd. is a leading B2B home furniture manufacturer based in Foshan, Guangdong, China. Founded in 2005, we specialize in manufacturing computer desks, ergonomic chairs, coffee tables, book cabinets, living room storage, and non-woven storage cabinets for international distributors, wholesalers, importers, and OEM/ODM partners.

## Products
- Computer Desks (L-shaped desks, standing desks, executive desks)
- Ergonomic Chairs (mesh office chairs, gaming chairs)
- Coffee Tables (solid wood, glass top, modern designs)
- Book Cabinets (bookshelves, display cabinets)
- Living Room Storage (TV stands, sideboards, entertainment units)
- Non-woven Storage Cabinets (portable wardrobes, fabric storage)

## Business Model
- B2B wholesale only (minimum order quantities apply)
- OEM and ODM manufacturing available
- Private label and custom branding services
- Export to 60+ countries worldwide

## Certifications
ISO 9001:2015, BSCI, FSC, CARB Phase 2, CE

- Email: sales@homestylefurniture.com
